title: Schnella coronata
taxonomy: Schnella coronata is classified within the family Acanthaceae, a large and diverse group of flowering plants. This family is commonly known as the acanthus or thorny flower family. Schnella coronata is a genus in the tribe Rupestres within the Acanthaceae family. The Acanthaceae family is part of the order Lamiales, which includes plants such as mint, basil, and honeysuckle. Schnella coronata is native to tropical and subtropical regions.
uses: Schnella coronata is a plant species that is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties. It is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and infections.
